summary: Video. A CBS News 'Face the Nation' remote interview with DHS Secretary Kristi Noem (shown against a White House backdrop) speaking about ICE and CBP arresting and deporting criminal illegal aliens and about making cities safe. She is shown speaking to camera with network branding and a chyron.
notable_text: CBS NEWS / FACE THE NATION / chyron: Naples, FL KRISTI NOEM U.S. SECRETARY OF HOMELAND SECURITY
